creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 166433
Update the FusionInventory Agent to 2.3.17

The difference from the previous patch is that I've stumbled about a small-ish documentation bug that  --pidfile is not documented in the help output and the behaviour is a bit strange (if not given the pid file is simply empty).

Guillaume, the new upstream maintainer and I discussed that during FOSDEM quickly this makes the daemon start and stop properly under FreeBSD.

It would be great if you tell me about remaining blockers so the ports tree can finally get that quite (much) newer version.

-- Mathieu
